title: PriceTagData
description: Structured result of parsing a Costco A-format rack card. tagType is 'unknown' only when NEITHER itemNumber NOR finalPrice is found; either may otherwise be null, and all remaining fields are best-effort.

itemNumber.description: 6-digit item number (the tracking key). Null when not found.

plusMark.description: True if a '+' immediately followed the item number (meaning TBD; kept raw).

nameKo.description: RESERVED — not yet extracted by the parser; always null.

model.description: RESERVED — not yet extracted by the parser; always null.

finalPrice.description: Final price in KRW. The physically largest price token on the tag.

periodStart.description: ISO date, best-effort (OCR can mangle separators).

unitPrice.description: Unit price next to a '단가 / <unit>' label, when present.

rawText.description: Full OCR text (input lines joined by '\n'). Always kept for re-parse / manual review. Omitted from spec/golden (pass-through, not parsing logic).
